name: Khoj
description: Self-hostable AI second brain that answers over your documents and the web, runs custom agents, and schedules automations. Offers an API plus Obsidian, Emacs, and desktop clients. 35k+ stars.

skills.name: Document Q&A
skills.description: Indexes personal documents and answers questions over them with citations across PDF, Markdown, and notes.

skills.name: Custom Agents
skills.description: Creates specialized agents with their own personas, tools, and knowledge bases for recurring workflows.

skills.name: Scheduled Automations
skills.description: Runs research or notification tasks on a schedule and delivers the results to the user automatically.
